title: chrysanthemum lavandulifolium var. lavandulifolium
intro: Chrysanthemum lavandulifolium var. lavandulifolium is a plant species within the chrysanthemum genus, also known as the Korean chamomile or white chrysanthemum, characterized by its white or pale yellow flowers and lavender-scented leaves. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum lavandulifolium var. lavandulifolium include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and soothing digestive issues. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts that can be consumed orally or applied topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
